headline: Genevant Sciences and Arbutus Biopharma Announce $2.25 Billion Global Settlement With Moderna
summary: Moderna to pay Genevant and Arbutus $950 million upfront and an additional $1.3 billion contingent upon a favorable resolution of Moderna’s Section 1498 appealIf the $1.3 billion payment is realized, this settlement will be the largest disclosed patent settlement paid in the pharmaceutical industry and the second largest in any industrySettlement holds Moderna accountable for infringement and provides for the court to enter judgment of no invalidity on the four Genevant/Arbutus patents asserted

headline: Moderna Resolves Global Patent Litigation with Arbutus/Genevant
summary: Moderna to pay $950 million with no future royalties to resolve all global litigation; corresponding charge expected in Q1 2026 District Court's Section 1498 decision to be appealed to the Federal Circuit Court of Appeals with potential additional ...
